title: armeria scabra subsp. arctica
intro: Armeria scabra subsp. arctica, also known as Arctic Sea Thrift, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Plumbaginaceae) that is native to the Arctic tundra. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and flowers being used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Armeria scabra subsp. arctica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
